creator: yinjieh@Crazyman.Dorm13.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
Update x11-clocks/xdaliclock port to 2.14

Fix: 

Please update this port, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -ruN /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/Makefile	Fri Sep  3 08:59:24 1999
+++ ./Makefile	Sat Oct  9 23:34:17 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	xdaliclock
-# Version required:			2.13
+# Version required:			2.14
 # Date created:				10th February 1995
 # Whom:					gpalmer
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/Makefile,v 1.14 1999/08/31 06:52:32 mharo Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	xdaliclock-2.13
+DISTNAME=	xdaliclock-2.14
 CATEGORIES=	x11-clocks
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.jwz.org/xdaliclock/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB}
diff -ruN /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/files/md5 ./files/md5
--- /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/files/md5	Mon Feb 22 23:33:16 1999
+++ ./files/md5	Sat Oct  9 23:26:57 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (xdaliclock-2.13.tar.gz) = 355478df0980e2e5ddc75f0cf94c6946
+MD5 (xdaliclock-2.14.tar.gz) = ec582bbf3eaff0c1cf022337eb441e64
diff -ruN /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/pkg/DESCR ./pkg/DESCR
--- /usr/ports/x11-clocks/xdaliclock/pkg/DESCR	Mon Feb 22 23:33:16 1999
+++ ./pkg/DESCR	Sat Oct  9 23:27:41 1999
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-XDaliClock V 2.05
+XDaliClock V 2.14
 
 This is a neat program which ``morphs'' each of the digits into the
 next in the sequence to update the time. Good processor hog for all you
